title: Nexus UI
description: A comprehensive React component library with 60+ accessible components, dark mode support, and full TypeScript coverage.
longDescription: Nexus UI started as an internal design system and grew into a full open-source component library. It features 60+ accessible components built with Radix primitives, styled with Tailwind CSS, and fully typed with TypeScript. Used by over 2,000 developers worldwide.

title: Velocity
description: Real-time collaboration platform with CRDTs, WebSocket sync, and an intuitive drag-and-drop canvas editor.
longDescription: Velocity is a real-time collaboration tool that lets teams design, plan, and execute together. Built with CRDTs for conflict-free editing, WebSocket connections for instant sync, and a canvas-based editor that supports drag-and-drop workflows.

title: DataForge
description: CLI toolkit for transforming, validating, and migrating data between databases with zero-downtime strategies.
longDescription: DataForge is a developer-first CLI tool for database operations. It supports schema migrations, data transformations, and cross-database syncing with zero-downtime deployment strategies. Compatible with PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, and MongoDB.

title: PixelSnap
description: Browser extension for designers that measures distances, picks colors, and exports CSS from any webpage.
longDescription: PixelSnap is a browser extension that turns any webpage into an inspectable design. Measure distances between elements, pick colors with precision, copy CSS properties, and export design tokens. Used by 15,000+ designers and developers.

title: Terraform Modules
description: Production-ready Terraform modules for AWS infrastructure: VPC, ECS, RDS, and CI/CD pipelines.
longDescription: A collection of battle-tested Terraform modules for AWS infrastructure. Includes modules for VPC networking, ECS Fargate services, RDS databases, S3 buckets with CDN, and complete CI/CD pipeline setups. Used in production by 200+ teams.

title: Markdown Studio
description: Beautiful Markdown editor with live preview, custom themes, and export to PDF, HTML, and DOCX.
longDescription: Markdown Studio is a desktop-class Markdown editor built for writers and developers. Features include live split-pane preview, 12 syntax themes, vim keybindings, frontmatter support, and export to PDF, HTML, and DOCX formats.
